examples: Petals 6 (-12), rose, purple, or white, crinkled, slenderly clawed.
At the end of the last century, marvelous spire was added, which makes it soar up slenderly into the German skies.
Clean potatoes and remove the peel, slenderly cut it into silk. And then take it into water for cleaning farina. So it will be crisp after stir-fried.
